game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Radiation City:** Players navigate a vast, open-world Pripyat in a first-person perspective, using a virtual joystick on the left for movement and swiping the right side of the screen to control the camera and aim. The core loop involves scavenging buildings for resources (e.g., 5 units of scrap metal, 1 can of food) and crafting essential survival items like melee weapons, firearms, and medical supplies. Survival mechanics require constant management of hunger, thirst, and radiation meters, which deplete every 60 seconds and must be replenished with specific consumables found or crafted. Combat is real-time, engaging mutated creatures and hostile survivors using equipped weapons, with damage output dependent on weapon type and enemy weak points. Progression involves unlocking new crafting recipes, discovering safe camps for fast travel and storage, and repairing vehicles that require fuel to operate, while difficulty scales through increasingly irradiated zones and more numerous, tougher enemies. Failure occurs if health, hunger, thirst, or radiation meters reach zero, resulting in death and respawn at the last activated safe camp.
game_info.description: Survive the irradiated wasteland of a post-apocalyptic city. Scavenge for resources, craft weapons and supplies, and manage your hunger, thirst, radiation, and health meters. Explore buildings to find materials, fight mutated creatures, and reach safe zones. Your goal is to survive long enough to reach the evacuation point at the edge of the map while keeping all your vital stats above zero.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move forward/backward and turn left/right
Space: Attack with equipped weapon
Shift: Sprint (drains hunger faster)
Z: Use consumable item (cycles through food, water, anti-rad)

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement mechanics and resource collection. Validates that the player can move around the world, enter buildings, collect items, and that position updates correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move in various directions to explore the map. Approach and enter buildings to trigger scavenging. Collect at least one of each resource type. Verify inventory updates properly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player position changes smoothly. Resources are added to inventory when buildings are scavenged. No collision errors or position glitches occur. Test passes when multiple resources are collected.
TEST_1.description: Tests basic movement mechanics and resource collection. Validates that the player can move around the world, enter buildings, collect items, and that position updates correctly.

TEST_1.expected: Player position changes smoothly. Resources are added to inventory when buildings are scavenged. No collision errors or position glitches occur. Test passes when multiple resources are collected.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the complete win condition by reaching the evacuation point. Validates survival mechanics, resource management, and navigation to the goal.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Navigate efficiently toward the evacuation zone while managing survival stats. Scavenge buildings along the path for food, water, and anti-rad items. Use consumables when meters get low. Avoid or defeat enemies efficiently.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player successfully reaches the evacuation point with all vital stats above zero. GAME_OVER_WIN state is triggered. Test validates that optimal play leads to victory within reasonable time.
TEST_2.description: Tests the complete win condition by reaching the evacuation point. Validates survival mechanics, resource management, and navigation to the goal.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests combat mechanics and enemy interactions. Validates that attacking works, enemies take damage, and player can defeat threats.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Seek out enemies and engage in combat. Use space bar to attack when enemies are in range. Observe health changes and enemy defeat mechanics.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Enemies take damage when attacked. Player can successfully defeat enemies. Combat is functional and responsive. Test passes when at least one enemy is defeated.
TEST_3.description: Tests combat mechanics and enemy interactions. Validates that attacking works, enemies take damage, and player can defeat threats.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests survival meter management and consumable usage. Validates that meters deplete over time and can be restored with items.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Monitor hunger, thirst, and radiation meters. Collect consumables and use them strategically. Test the Z key cycling and consumption mechanics.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Meters deplete at correct rates. Using consumables restores the appropriate meters. Player can survive longer by managing resources. Test passes when meters are successfully restored multiple times.
TEST_4.description: Tests survival meter management and consumable usage. Validates that meters deplete over time and can be restored with items.

TEST_5.test_description: Tests game over conditions from various failure states. Validates that the game properly ends when any vital stat reaches zero.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Allow one vital stat to deplete to zero without restoration. Observe game over trigger and proper state transition.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Game transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE when any vital stat hits zero. Proper game over screen is displayed. Test passes when game over is triggered correctly.
